2605.05963.title: TheraAgent: Self-Improving Therapeutic Agent for Precise and Comprehensive Treatment Planning
2605.05963.paper_summary: Formulating a treatment plan is inherently a complex reasoning and refinement task rather than a simple generation problem. However, existing large language models (LLMs) mainly rely on one-shot output without explicit verification, which may result in rough, incomplete, and potentially unsafe treatment plans. To address these limitations, we propose TheraAgent, an agentic framework that replaces one-shot generation with an iterative generate-judge-refine pipeline. By mirroring the actual reasoning process of human experts who iteratively revise treatment plans, our framework progressively transforms coarse and incomplete drafts into precise, comprehensive, and safer therapeutic regimens. To facilitate the critical judge component, we introduce TheraJudge, a treatment-specific evaluation module integrated into the inference loop to enforce clinical standards. Experiments show TheraAgent achieves state-of-the-art results on HealthBench, leading in Accuracy and Completeness. In expert evaluations, it attains an 86% win rate against physicians, with superior Targeting and Harm Control. Moreover, the highly agreement between TheraJudge and HealthBench evaluations confirms the reliability of our framework.
2605.05963.paper_summary_zh: 制定治療計畫本質上是一個複雜的推理和精煉任務，而不是一個簡單的生成問題。<lb/>然而，現有的大型語言模型（LLMs）主要依賴一次性輸出而沒有明確的驗證，這可能導致粗糙、不完整且潛在不安全的治療計畫。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了TheraAgent，一個代理框架，將一次性生成替換為迭代的生成-評估-精煉流程。<lb/>通過模仿人類專家實際的推理過程，這些專家會迭代修訂治療計畫，我們的框架逐步將粗糙和不完整的草稿轉變為精確、全面且更安全的治療方案。<lb/>為了促進關鍵的評估組件，我們引入了TheraJudge，一個專門針對治療的評估模組，集成到推理循環中以強化臨床標準。<lb/>實驗顯示，TheraAgent在HealthBench上達到了最先進的結果，在準確性和完整性方面領先。<lb/>在專家評估中，它對醫生的勝率達到86%，在目標設定和危害控制方面表現優越。<lb/>此外，TheraJudge與HealthBench評估之間的高度一致性確認了我們框架的可靠性。
2605.05963.author: Junkai Li et.al.
2605.05963.authors: Junkai Li, Yunghwei Lai, Tianyi Zhu, Zheng Long Lee, Weizhi Ma, Yang Liu
